name: AREthSetValueQWord
title: AREthSetValueQWord
syntax: long AREthSetValueQWord( dword objectHandle, char valuePath[], qword value );
description: This function can be used to set a raw value in the object specified in the objectHandle parameter. The value is accessed in this case via symbolic access paths.

parameters.name: objectHandle
parameters.description: Handle to a AUTOSAR Eth IL object, which must be completely described in the AUTOSAR database.The following objects are supported.
